address: Starflower Way, Mickleover, Derby, Derbyshire, DE3
description: John Shepherd are delighted to present to the rental market this wonderful two bedroom second floor unfurnished apartment for £950pcm! The property compromises of an entrance hallway, open lounge and kitchen, two double bedrooms, family bathroom and en-suite. This spacious apartment benefits from allocated parking behind secure gates along with lovely views. Starflower Way is situated in Mickleover and is in the Ecclesbourne School catchment area. The property is also in close proximity to the A38, A50 and M1 too. Perfect for commuting!
